title: erigeron peregrinus var. scaposus
intro: Erigeron peregrinus var. scaposus, also known as the Alpine Fleabane, is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of North America, characterized by its small white or pink flowers and hairy leaves. The medicinal properties of Erigeron peregrinus var. scaposus include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation and pain, and support immune function. Erigeron peregrinus var. scaposus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or salves, making it a popular remedy among herbalists and natural health practitioners.
